name: Origene
message: [AI generated] Origene Technologies Inc. is a biotechnological company that specializes in innovative gene-related research and other customized research areas for the scientific community. Their primary focus includes antibody development, gene synthesis, CRISPR tools, and other experimental models. Founded in 1996 and headquartered in Rockville, Maryland, U.S., Origene operates globally and offers its products and solutions to a wide range of industries like pharmaceuticals, diagnostics, academia, and more.
